note: Narration for the grayscott reveal blend. Lines align to blend_cut.py caption beats. ~18s at a calm pace.
lines: This looks like a living cell, dividing.
It isn't. No DNA. No membrane. No life.
It's a simulation — just two chemicals, following two simple rules.
And yet, it grows. It divides. It behaves like life. This is how life may have begun.
